title: 有馬記念の後に・変わらない強さ

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and Narita Brian really ran their
hearts out.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but still... Narita Brian is on a completely
different level, even though she didn't get first.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how to say it, but she's so intense!
She's a total beast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Dang it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I gave it my best shot! My runnin' was nothing
short of perfect! And yet...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(My emotions lost out against Narita Brian's own
spirit and drive!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Argh! This sucks!

In stark contrast to the Shuka Sho, Hishi Amazon
leaves the track without any post-race interviews.

She tells me she's going to pack her stuff and
head back early, and then she's gone.
She's tough, but still...

I know how long she waited for this race... and
how high the stakes were.

My worries get the better of me, and I rush back
to the academy to go find her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Grrraaaah!

I'm greeted by the sound of a familiar voice the
moment I reach campus.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I still don't have what it takes! And so what?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can always keep runnin'! I'll blast right past 'em
all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You never know how a race'll turn out till you run
it!

She charges up the incline, shouting words of
encouragement to herself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing out there is impossible right from the
get-go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You never know the outcome of a match till you
give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Pant... Phew!

She said those very same things to me before I
scouted her. It was her straightforward honesty
that won me over.

No matter the situation she must contend with,
she remains stalwart and isn't afraid to keep
going.

There's only one thing I can say to someone as
strong as her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Teach, when did you get here?
choice_data_list: Let's give the Arima Kinen another go next year!

text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is sure to show up at the Arima Kinen
next year.

I tell Hishi Amazon that we'll win next time, for
sure. If anyone can do it, it's her!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Teach, you...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yeah! Thanks!

Afterwards, we discuss our next steps.
Considering the aptitude she showed for miles
and medium-distance races during the Tiara
tour...

We decide to make our next goal the Osaka Hai,
followed by the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach? This could be my ego talking, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get first place in both of 'em. I won't
settle for less!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta step up to the challenge. Otherwise, I
won't have a chance against Narita Brian. She's
one heck of a beast.
Together, we vow to win first place in both races!
